name: trace-my-code
description: A living trace of your codebase — domain + architecture + patterns — that makes a coding agent understand what you mean and reuse what's already there.

plugins.name: trace-my-code
plugins.description: Curated, self-refreshing architecture + domain docs (Obsidian-format, drift hook) so a coding agent understands your domain and reuses what exists instead of rebuilding it.
